title: affinity player heads
description: A quick plugin that lets you make player heads, and mob heads drop on death
body:
![Horion-Productions](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1159783773026648116/1165812386993803264/minecraft_title.png?ex=65483664&is=6535c164&hm=6db85a1ffabcf03868ce831ef0f598b4379bda80bb6022b8020c56781d4b5eef&=)

A simple plugin, that makes players drop their heads on death, includes a config to let you edit the percentage chance of a player head dropping on death, can reload the config with /APHreload
